name: @ai-zen/agents-sdk
description: AI-Zen Agents SDK — shared business logic for CLI and Desktop

scripts.test:integration: npm run pretest && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run pretest && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run pretest && vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
